reviews.review_description: I was playing in a forest lobby and i called someone bad even tho they said it first to me so i got banned for 24 hours for calling someone bad but there were also people mostly everyone calling eachother the r word the b word and really everything and they didnt get banned but i did for calling someon  bad

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: A mod banned me for no reason I was branching and my mic was off bc I was listening to music and when I do that I mute my mic the mod came up to me and reported me to the discord for not speaking and other people were saying the n word

Memory Tag is so fun, with an amazing community! The first lobby I joined I was welcomed and I got to know the community really well and now I'm trial-mod in the game! I really recommend this game if you want to change up the way you play, this game is honestly addicting because of how fun it is!
